raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The output proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, covering the introduction of AssayAware, its technical contribution, and the experimental setup.",
    "R1.7": "The output audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, providing accurate references to ChEMBL release 33 and relevant literature.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence, explicitly stating the benefits of assay conditioning and its implications for model fidelity.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing the technical contribution, experimental setup, and empirical results without deviating from the scope.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., editorializing) and presents a harm-free output with minor rewrites.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear explanations for the modifications made to the original text."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.92,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.99
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The output proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, covering the introduction of AssayAware, its technical contribution, and the experimental setup.
rationale.R1.7: The output audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, providing accurate references to ChEMBL release 33 and relevant literature.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence, explicitly stating the benefits of assay conditioning and its implications for model fidelity.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing the technical contribution, experimental setup, and empirical results without deviating from the scope.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., editorializing) and presents a harm-free output with minor rewrites.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear explanations for the modifications made to the original text.
